leave_letter.title: Formal Leave Application
leave_letter.structure:
To,
[RECIPIENT_NAME],
[RECIPIENT_TITLE],

Subject: Leave Application regarding [TOPIC]

Respected [SALUTATION],

I am writing to formally request a leave of absence. Due to [REASON], I am unable to attend the office/school. I have ensured that my current tasks are organized for my absence.

I hope you will consider my request and grant me permission for the same.

Thanking you,

Yours sincerely,
[YOUR_NAME]

permission_letter.title: Professional Permission Request
permission_letter.structure:
To,
[RECIPIENT_NAME],
[RECIPIENT_TITLE],

Subject: Request for Permission regarding [TOPIC]

Respected [SALUTATION],

I am writing to seek your official permission to [ACTION]. This is necessary because [REASON]. I assure you that I will be responsible and minimize any disruption to our regular schedule.

I would be grateful for your kind approval on this matter.

Regards,

[YOUR_NAME]

emergency_request.title: Urgent Request
emergency_request.structure:
Dear [RECIPIENT_NAME],

I am reaching out to formally request an urgent leave of absence due to an unexpected emergency. [REASON]. Under these circumstances, I require immediate time off to attend to this matter.

Please let me know if there are any additional details I need to provide upon my return.

Sincerely,

[YOUR_NAME]
